lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello stranger.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah very friendly I see. What's that coffin on your back?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: For carryin' the dead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Woah, don't tell me you have a body in there?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: No, remains.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, you carry the remains of shades in it? Could you give me one?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's broken? What am I suppose to do with a broken coffin?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Bring me locks, find in the catacombs... I repair coffin with locks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... Guess I should head into the catacombs then... see if I can find any of these 'locks'.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, as cheerful as ever I see.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: What d'ya want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You gave me a broken coffin, what am I suppose to do with it?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Bring me locks, I fix coffin with locks...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... and where am I suppose to find such locks?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: In catacombs... in chests...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found one of the locks you were talking about, I think.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: That is it, give to me now and I repair the coffin.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: You ain't got no broken coffin for me to fix. If you need one, just ask.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Finished, take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'm going to hang on to it for now.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I get another of those coffins?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Get lost, you've already got a coffin, I ain't givin' you anotha.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's broken?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Bring me locks, find in the catacombs... I repair coffin with locks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did you get those robes?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Given to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: By who?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: A dead friend of mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... how did they die?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: In the catacombs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry to hear that...

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, I just wanted to chat.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you fix this for me?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Depends, you got any locks for it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No...

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Yeah, well clear off them a go find one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you fix this for me?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Depends, you got any locks for it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I found this lock in the catacombs? Can you do anything with it?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts* Lets 'ava look.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: You ain't got no broken coffin for me to fix. If you need one, just ask.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I found this lock in the catacombs? Can you do anything with it?

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: *grunts* Lets 'ava look.

lines.speaker: Dampe
lines.text: Finished, take it.
